semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: The code previously added all server types to the workerIds list, potentially including non-historical servers, which could lead to incorrect worker assignment or processing errors.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: Introduced a conditional check to only add servers of type ServerType.HISTORICAL to the workerIds list, ensuring only appropriate servers are considered as workers.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Restrict worker selection to only historical servers when building the workerIds list.

hunk_chain.summary: Adds an import statement for ServerType to enable type checking in the following code.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: This import is necessary to reference ServerType in the conditional logic introduced in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Wraps the addition of workerIds in a conditional that only includes servers of type ServerType.HISTORICAL.

hunk_application.agent_evaluation: Hunks applied successfully to all target files.
